task_description: crawl a public documentation website, collect up to two hundred pages, extract titles headings and internal links, build a link graph, identify hub pages and isolated pages, save the graph to JSON, generate a summary report, and print the most connected page
code:
echo "Please provide the URL of the public documentation website."
read url
echo "Starting crawl of $url"
timeout 60s curl -I "$url" 2>/dev/null | grep HTTP
